message:
fix: instant Cluster Admin navigation — remove blocking multi-cluster hooks (#7675)

* fix: remove blocking multi-cluster hooks from ClusterAdmin page

ClusterAdmin called useCachedPodIssues, useCachedWarningEvents, and
useCachedNodes at the page level just for 3 stat block values. Each
hook fired multi-cluster fetches with 10s timeouts per unreachable
cluster, causing 11+ second page load times.

Now delegates nodes/warnings/pod_issues stats to useUniversalStats
(which reads from the shared cache without triggering new fetches).
Cluster-specific stats (healthy/degraded/offline) still use the fast
useClusters() cache.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: Security page renders instantly — don't block on security fetch

Security passed isLoading=securityLoading which blocked rendering
until the multi-cluster security scan completed (4.5s+ with
unreachable clusters). Now renders cards immediately with
isLoading=false and shows the security fetch as isRefreshing instead.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
